guest_name: Roaul Pal, Humphrey Yang, Jaspreet Singh

key_insights.insight: Saving money in a typical bank account leads to guaranteed losses due to inflation exceeding interest rates.
key_insights.quote: It's a guaranteed loss. You're becoming poorer every single day.

key_insights.insight: Investing in yourself by acquiring new skills, especially in emerging fields like AI, can lead to higher income potential.
key_insights.quote: So if i had a thousand dollars i'm investing in myself so trying to improve my skills to makemore money at some point

key_insights.insight: The best investments are often in your network, surrounding yourself with ambitious people.
key_insights.quote: Invest in your network...just surround yourself by people who are also trying to push themselves to push their income, push our opportunity set.

key_insights.insight: People avoid their own money due to financial jargon and the intimidation of the financial world, yet building confidence to learn is crucial.
key_insights.quote: It's the confidence that you can learn. Because a lot of people say, no, no, unless you're from an investment bank or you'rean RAA or something, you can't do this.

key_insights.insight: To gain awareness of personal spending habits, track expenses for a period of 30-90 days, as most people significantly underestimate their monthly spending.
key_insights.quote: Track your expenses for 30 days, 60 days, or 90 days.and you're going to learn so much more aboutjust your personal habits of what you do

key_insights.insight: Most people should not be active investors, as passive investors in the S&P 500 tend to outperform most stock pickers.
key_insights.quote: I say most people should not be active investors.In fact, I say 98% of America should not be active investors.Just be a passive investor because if you don't want to put in the work, if you're not willing to put in the time and the effort to research, you're probably going to lose.

key_insights.insight: Wealthy people prioritize saving and investing their money first, while others spend first and save whatever is left, if anything.
key_insights.quote: Because the difference between the person that becomes wealthy and everybody else is wealthypeople save and invest their money first. Everybody else, especially in America, I spend all mymoney, I wonder where all my money went.

key_insights.insight: The core issue with retirement plans is their dependence on new workers to support current retirees, creating a demographic problem in the long term.
key_insights.quote: the only way it's running is because people arepaying it in the problem is there's not enough money coming inbecause rememberwe talked about the beginning the demographicsthere's less and less young peoplethere's less and less young people

actionable_advice.advice: Identify and monetize your unique skills.
actionable_advice.how_to: Reflect on hobbies and areas where you excel, then explore opportunities to teach, consult, or create products based on your expertise.
List all debts from highest to lowest interest rate and allocate all available funds towards paying off the debt with the highest interest rate first.

actionable_advice.advice: Consider geographic arbitrage to accelerate financial independence.
actionable_advice.how_to: Explore locations with a lower cost of living and a strong internet connection to reduce expenses while maintaining income.

actionable_advice.advice: Track your spending to identify areas for improvement.
actionable_advice.how_to: For 30-90 days, meticulously document all expenses using a spreadsheet or budgeting app to pinpoint areas where you can cut back.

memorable_stories: Humphrey's story about spending $20,000 worth of Bitcoin on coffee in Palo Alto due to slow transaction times.
Roaul's recollection of working in telesales, highlighting how it was surprisingly impactful.
The anecdote of Harry Stubbings, who built a massive investment fund based on his relationships with rich people cultivated through his podcast, 20VC.
The tale of Devesh Mackin turning a layoff into a wealth of connections among early Silicon Valley innovators.
contrarian_claims: Getting a mortgage is one of the worst pieces of financial advice.
Saving money is generally a bad idea due to inflation, investing is far more important.
Buying a house is not an investment, it's an expense.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Investing Vs Real Estate Vs Crypto Debate: The Retirement Crisis Is Coming & They’re Lying To You About Renting!
